column1: # 50 × 48 000 B = 2.4 MB worst-case payload + LittleFS metadata; the
# 3.456 MB region gives ~1 MB of slack.
# !! WARNING — first flash with this table erases all on-device data.
# The previous stock layout used the same offset for SPIFFS
# and LittleFS are different filesystems; the migration to LittleFS
# invalidates whatever was there. Editor IndexedDB layouts are
# `slate_data` SubType stays `spiffs` because both the bundled
# arduino-esp32 LittleFS driver and the lorol/LittleFS_esp32 library
# mount any partition with subtype `spiffs`. Using a custom subtype
# would require a custom partition lookup that we don't need.
